calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amilcar Hernandez, T: 415.933.1734, defendant appearing on his own behalf, with court appointed Spanish Interpreter Jean Garascia;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. Defendant confirmed that he was served properly with the motion but did not provide any argument. There being no opposition, the Court adopted the tentative ruling:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order and the proposed judgment submitted by plaintiff's counsel by email pursuant to the tentative ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2019 Set For Trial On Nov-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
